items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: The Stashpad Docs plugin for Obsidian.
items.title: stashpad/obsidian-to-stashpad: The Stashpad Docs plugin for Obsidian.

items.content_html: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.
items.title: RafaelGB/Obsidian-ZettelFlow: ZettelFlow is a plugin for Obsidian that helps you to create and manage your notes in a Zettelkasten way.

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin for customizing and displaying the vault name (title) in the side navigation file explorer, similar to pre 1.6.0 versions of Obsidian.
items.title: gapmiss/obsidian-vault-name: An Obsidian.md plugin for customizing and displaying the vault name (title) in the side navigation file explorer, similar to pre 1.6.0 versions of Obsidian.

items.title: cwegrzyn/obsidian-forged: Obsidian plugin for Ironsworn/Starforged games

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin to enable keyboard based navigation and interaction in the file explorer.
items.title: denvolok/obsidian-file-explorer-navigation: Obsidian plugin to enable keyboard based navigation and interaction in the file explorer.

items.content_html: An obsidian plugin which allows you to resolve abbreviations as you write
items.title: WoodenMaiden/obsidian-abbreviations: An obsidian plugin which allows you to resolve abbreviations as you write

items.content_html: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!
items.title: ObsidianPublisher/obsidian-github-publisher: Github Publisher helps you to publish your notes on a preconfigured GitHub repository from your Obsidian Vault, for free, and more!

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
items.title: chrisgrieser/obsidian-quadro: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugins build for managers
items.title: Educentr/obsidian-setting-pack: Obsidian plugins build for managers

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
